Type Property# systemClockDidChange

iOS 26.0+iPadOS 26.0+Mac Catalyst 26.0+macOS 26.0+tvOS 26.0+visionOS 26.0+watchOS 26.0+

```
static var systemClockDidChange: NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<Date.SystemClockDidChangeMessage> { get }
```

Available when `Self` is `NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<Date.SystemClockDidChangeMessage>`.## [See Also](/documentation/foundation/notificationcenter/messageidentifier/systemclockdidchange#see-also)
